_note: Template registry. 'file' is relative to templates/. Tokens are mustache-style {{TOKEN}}, filled by new_post.py. All templates are responsive to the --size flag (the .canvas reads --w/--h). Hand-build for ideas outside these archetypes.

tokens.notes: HEADLINE supports \n for line breaks and inline <em>/<strong>/<mark> (mark = highlighter). Empty content tokens render blank. Templates are STARTING POINTS — pick an aesthetic direction (data/directions.json + scripts/ideate.py) and push the template toward it with motifs from reference/directions.md, or hand-build for directions no template covers.

templates.name: Bold Statement / Quote
templates.use: quotes, hot takes, one-line value props, carousel covers, hooks

templates.name: Announcement / Launch / Promo
templates.use: new drops, launches, sales, events — has eyebrow pill + CTA button

templates.name: Tip / Listicle Slide
templates.use: how-to steps, numbered tips, carousel body slides

templates.name: Stat / Big Number
templates.use: a single impressive metric as the hero

templates.name: Editorial Vintage
templates.use: warm cream-paper editorial: serif headline, orange accent, sketch underline + doodle (direction: editorial-vintage)

templates.name: Blueprint / Diagram
templates.use: technical grid-paper: bold headline with highlighter, connector dots, mono label (direction: blueprint-diagram)

templates.name: Carousel Cover / Hook
templates.use: slide 1 of a carousel: pure hook, huge type, counter pill + swipe cue

templates.name: CTA / End-card
templates.use: last slide of a carousel: one big CTA (follow/save), handle prominent

templates.name: Comparison / VS
templates.use: A-vs-B: dual glass panels + center VS + payoff bar. Chrome token-filled; edit panel labels + 3 rows each + payoff (category: comparison-vs)

templates.name: Feature / Benefit Grid
templates.use: 2x3 icon-card grid of features/benefits. Chrome token-filled; edit the 6 cells (category: feature-grid)

templates.name: Listicle (numbered)
templates.use: 5 numbered points on one slide. Chrome token-filled; edit the rows (category: listicle)

templates.name: Step-by-step Flow
templates.use: 4 connected numbered step cards. Chrome token-filled; edit the steps (category: step-by-step)

templates.name: Checklist / Takeaways
templates.use: Ticked rows + summary chip. Chrome token-filled; SUBHEAD = summary, edit rows (category: checklist)

templates.name: Testimonial (glass)
templates.use: Stars + quote + avatar in a glass panel. HEADLINE = quote; edit name/role (category: testimonial)

templates.name: Profile / Intro
templates.use: Avatar + name + niche tags + bio + follow. HEADLINE = name, SUBHEAD = bio (category: profile-intro)

templates.name: Timeline / Roadmap
templates.use: Vertical connector spine with 4 phase nodes. Chrome token-filled; edit nodes (category: timeline-roadmap)

templates.name: Myth-bust
templates.use: Myth (strike-through) vs Truth blocks. HEADLINE = topic; edit the two lines (category: myth-bust)
